title: MessageCreateInput fields have no doc comments; sent_at format is undocumented
description: MessageCreateInput (methods.rs lines 99-107) and MessageQueryInput (lines 89-96) have no doc comments on any fields. The problem is most acute on MessageCreateInput: client_id is described only in the method doc, not on the struct; sent_at accepts a &str but nowhere says RFC 3339 is required; body_type has no pointer to the supported MIME types list in ChatCapability. A contributor constructing MessageCreateInput from the struct definition alone must chase the method doc or the spec.
